content_body:
A great writer once said... "Though we travel the world over to find the beautiful, we must carry it with us or we find it not."
~Ralph Waldo Emerson

Thank you for sharing the magnificent space carved out in all of God's beauty. The details are amazing! My beautiful daughter shared and celebrated a birthday milestone (25 years young)! Anayesik, her best friend, planned this retreat and we are very thankful for the beautiful friendship, and thankful that she wanted to spend this time with family.
title: A Magnificent Space!
